retry_reason: The put operation always executes and there is no failure path; if the refcount were already zero it would be a bug (double-put), so retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This put wrapper releases a reference on an auth_domain by decrementing its kref refcount under the protection of auth_domain_lock. If the refcount reaches zero, it triggers the release function (auth_domain_release) which frees the object. After this call, the caller must not access the auth_domain pointer or attempt to release another reference to it. This function does not return any status; the release is unconditional and the caller should have obtained a valid reference beforehand.
